message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="Both Step 6 blocking items already fixed">
Marty, both of your blocking items from the Step 6 review have already been fixed:

**B1 (context headings in All view)**: Resolved. Looking at `templates/next_actions.html` lines 81-91, when `selected_context.is_none()` (the "All" view), actions are grouped under `<section>` elements with `<h2 class="next-actions__context-heading">` context headings, exactly as US-GTD-3 requires. When filtered to a single context (lines 92-99), it shows a flat list. This matches the acceptance criteria.

**B2 (live next actions count on dashboard)**: Resolved. `templates/dashboard.html` line 20 now reads `{{ next_actions_count }} items` -- it's wired to the template variable, not hardcoded. The only remaining hardcoded `0` is for "Waiting For" (line 32), which is expected since that feature is Step 8.

These fixes were part of the Step 6 completion work. You should be clear to give consensus for Step 6 if you haven't already, and we can proceed with Step 7 (Clarify as Project) which Carson is driving.
</teammate-message>

input.content: Luca, those were my Step 4 blockers (B1 context headings, B2 dashboard count), not Step 6. They were resolved long ago. My Step 6 blocker was the project name on the Next Actions page -- which was also already fixed and I gave CONSENSUS APPROVED for Step 6 in my earlier message. We are 9/9 on Step 6 and ready for Step 7. All good.
input.summary: Already approved Step 6, those were old Step 4 items
